message:
fix(formula): correct compactor database name defaults

The mol-dog-compactor formula had stale database name defaults
("hq,beads,gastown") using rig names instead of actual Dolt database
names ("hq,bd,gt"). This caused Dogs to fail when the formula defaults
were used instead of daemon-passed variables.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: mayor

files.patch:
@@ -164,7 +164,7 @@ default = "500"
 
 [vars.databases]
 description = "Comma-separated list of databases to compact (falls back to wisp_reaper config, then auto-discovery)"
-default = "hq,beads,gastown"
+default = "hq,bd,gt"
 
 [vars.mode]
 description = "Compaction strategy: 'flatten' (default) or 'surgical'"
